name: Ahso Restaurant

notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against the current identities and menu surfaces for Ahso Restaurant and Ahso Cellars.
All 22 frozen rows came solely from Ahso Cellars at suite #105, which explicitly calls itself the sister to Ahso Restaurant; the audited restaurant is at suite #108.
The correction contains 42 current Ahso Restaurant formulations across the restaurant-issued dinner menu, directly linked ordering menu, and recurring Monday and Wednesday food sections.
Exact duplicate presentations were consolidated, differing fixed descriptions were retained as distinct formulations, and standalone add-ons, alcohol, and variable weekly specials were excluded.
Ahso publishes fixed item descriptions and a general dietary-accommodation FAQ, but no complete item-level allergen matrix, complete recipes, or cross-contact policy.
The FAQ statement that most of the menu happens to be gluten-free is not an item-level absence claim and was not assigned to products.
Thirty-five current formulations have positive signals supported by fixed text or an unavoidable named format; seven remain unavailable rather than inferred.
All 22 frozen allergen rows are not applicable because their sole evidence belongs to the separate sister business.
The frozen generic-site replacement resolved the audited Ahso Restaurant identity to an Ahso Cellars Toast source with a different business name, suite number, and business description.
The correction pins restaurant-issued content to suite #108 and treats the operational Toast catalog as restaurant-linked vendor evidence only because Ahso Restaurant's own homepage links to it.
Restaurant-issued and ordering formulations are kept separate where their descriptions differ; general dietary prose is not converted into item allergens.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Confirmed Ahso Restaurant at suite #108 and its directly linked ordering route.
Captured and reviewed the current restaurant-issued dinner menu and its warning that kitchen changes can precede website updates.
Captured the restaurant's dietary-accommodation statement; found no complete item-level allergen matrix, recipes, or cross-contact policy.

Reviewed the current directly linked Ahso Restaurant ordering catalog at suite #108, including its scheduled food sections; direct ledger capture returned HTTP 403, so reproducible row identifiers were recorded from the accessible representation.
Confirmed that the frozen source is Ahso Cellars at suite #105 and that the source explicitly identifies it as Ahso Restaurant's sister business.

findings.summary: Every frozen row was extracted from Ahso Cellars at suite #105 rather than the audited Ahso Restaurant at suite #108.
findings.resolution: Removed all 22 sister-business rows and rebuilt the catalog exclusively from Ahso Restaurant's current restaurant-issued and directly linked surfaces.

findings.summary: The frozen catalog contained none of Ahso Restaurant's current menu as a source-valid restaurant catalog.
findings.resolution: Prepared 42 current formulations across 11 source-and-meal categories, including recurring scheduled food sections.

findings.summary: The frozen rows reported allergen data as unavailable for the audited restaurant even though the rows and their source belonged to another business.
findings.resolution: Classified all frozen allergen verdicts as not applicable and computed 35 positive source-bounded results for the actual restaurant while retaining seven unavailable rows.

repairs.summary: Prepared and focused-tested a 42-formulation Ahso Restaurant catalog across 11 current categories with 35 positive rows, seven unavailable rows, and no Ahso Cellars, alcohol, add-on, or variable weekly-special contamination.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=/tmp/ahso-repository.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (isolated copy; verified 42 items, 11 categories, 35 positive rows, seven unavailable rows, and zero Ahso Cellars sources)

notes: Current corrected catalog counts: 42 formulations, 43 presentations, 11 categories, 35 positive rows, and seven unavailable rows.
